# Amazon Q Business Document History

## All Changes Listed (Chronological - Newest to Oldest)

| Change | Description | Date |
|--------|-------------|------|
| **New Agentic RAG feature** | Enhance Amazon Q Business standard retrieval augmented generation (RAG) capabilities with agentic workflows | August 14, 2025 |
| **Added support for Clickable S3 Link Feature** | Users can access source documents from S3 through citation links in chat responses | July 22, 2025 |
| **Relevancy tuning replaces metadata boosting on new applications** | Admins can control search results based on document creation/modification dates or storage location | July 1, 2025 |
| **New response customization feature** | Customize Amazon Q Business chat responses | July 1, 2025 |
| **Amazon Q Business application environments for anonymous access** | Create Amazon Q Business application environments for anonymous access | April 29, 2025 |
| **New hallucination mitigation feature** | Reduce response hallucinations during Amazon Q Business chat | April 10, 2025 |
| **Private Amazon S3 buckets for web customization artifacts** | Save customizations in private S3 buckets | March 18, 2025 |
| **Amazon Q Business integration for Microsoft Word** | Add-in for Microsoft Word integration | February 27, 2025 |
| **Amazon Q Business integration for Microsoft Outlook** | Add-in for Microsoft Outlook integration | February 27, 2025 |
| **New Amazon Q Business chat orchestration controls** | Admin controls and guardrails for chat orchestration settings | February 4, 2025 |
| **Amazon Kendra GenAI Enterprise Edition indices support** | Use Amazon Kendra GenAI Enterprise Edition index with Amazon Q Business | December 4, 2024 |
| **Q Apps plugins support** | Q Apps supports all Amazon Q Business plugins (built-in and custom) with more supported actions | December 3, 2024 |
| **New managed policy: QBusinessQuicksightPluginPolicy** | Provides permissions for Amazon Q Business application environment to communicate with Amazon QuickSight | December 3, 2024 |
| **New Quick plugin** | Fully integrated Quick plugin to get insights from structured data through Amazon QuickSight | December 3, 2024 |
| **New Amazon Q Business plugins** | Updated plugins experience with new plugins and more supported actions | December 3, 2024 |
| **Amazon QuickSight-integrated Amazon Q Business application environment** | Create Amazon QuickSight-integrated Amazon Q Business application environment | December 3, 2024 |
| **Amazon Q Business visual themes customization** | Customization options for web experience to align with organizational branding | December 3, 2024 |
| **Amazon Q Business data accessors** | Securely share enterprise data with verified software providers (ISVs) | December 3, 2024 |
| **Amazon Q index for software providers (ISVs)** | ISVs can access and integrate company data into their application environments | December 3, 2024 |
| **Amazon Q Business Slack integration** | Slack integration for Amazon Q Business | December 1, 2024 |
| **Amazon Q Business Microsoft Teams integration** | Microsoft Teams integration for Amazon Q Business | December 1, 2024 |
| **Extracting semantic meaning from embedded visual content** | Amazon Q Business can extract semantic meaning from embedded visual content | December 1, 2024 |
| **Data collection in Amazon Q Apps** | Create data collection apps to gather information from users with AI analysis | November 26, 2024 |
| **Amazon Q Business browser extensions** | Browser extensions for enhanced web browsing experience | November 22, 2024 |
| **Smartsheet connector** | Smartsheet data source connector support | November 21, 2024 |
| **Recent file support** | Support for recent files in Amazon Q Business | November 21, 2024 |
| **Cross-region inference in Amazon Q Business** | Select optimal region within geography to process inference requests | November 19, 2024 |
| **Custom labels for Amazon Q Apps** | Administrators can customize labels available for published Q Apps | November 7, 2024 |
| **Service-linked role support for Amazon Q Apps** | Service-linked role for creating application environments with Q Apps | October 22, 2024 |
| **Q App Analytics dashboard** | New analytics dashboard for Q Apps user interaction metrics | October 22, 2024 |
| **New managed policy: QAppsServiceRolePolicy** | Managed policy providing permissions to publish metrics | October 22, 2024 |
| **Monitor user conversations with Amazon CloudWatch Logs** | Use CloudWatch Logs to monitor and analyze user conversations and response feedback | October 22, 2024 |
| **Monitor Q Apps with Amazon CloudWatch** | CloudWatch metrics for Q Apps monitoring | October 22, 2024 |
| **Embed Amazon Q Business into trusted websites** | Amazon Q embedded - embed assistant within trusted websites | October 15, 2024 |
| **Admins can now verify Amazon Q Apps** | Admins can review and update published apps status to "Verified" | September 10, 2024 |
| **Identity federation through IAM support** | Use IAM Federation to manage end user access | August 22, 2024 |
| **Cross-region IAM Identity Center support** | Create cross-region IAM Identity Center and Amazon Q Business integrations | July 25, 2024 |
| **Introducing new CW metrics for Amazon Q Business** | New chat metrics for Amazon Q | July 24, 2024 |
| **General availability (GA) of Amazon Q Apps** | Amazon Q Apps now generally available | July 10, 2024 |
| **Amazon Q Business personalized chats** | Personalized chat responses for end users | July 5, 2024 |
| **Amazon Q Business scanned PDF support** | Support for uploading scanned PDFs into data source connectors | July 2, 2024 |
| **Service-linked role support** | Service-linked role for creating application environments | April 30, 2024 |
| **Preview release of Amazon Q Apps** | Initial preview release of Amazon Q Apps | April 30, 2024 |
| **Migrating Amazon Q Business application environments to IAM Identity Center** | Support for migrating SAML 2.0 compliant environments to IAM Identity Center | April 30, 2024 |
| **Amazon Q Business custom plugins** | Create custom plugins for Amazon Q Business application environment | April 30, 2024 |
| **Amazon Q Business streaming chat API** | Streaming chat API support | April 30, 2024 |
| **Amazon Q Business general release** | Amazon Q Business now generally available | April 30, 2024 |
| **Amazon Q Business IAM Identity Center integration** | Use IAM Identity Center to manage user access | April 16, 2024 |
| **Amazon Q Business admin controls and guardrails update** | New web experience chat modes configurable using admin controls | April 16, 2024 |
| **Amazon Q Business (For Business Use) guide name update** | Developer Guide renamed to "Amazon Q Business User Guide" | March 29, 2024 |
| **Boosting chat results using document attributes** | Support for boosting content using document attributes | February 14, 2024 |
| **Preview release** | Initial preview release of Amazon Q Business (For Business Use) Developer Guide | November 28, 2023 |
